message:
🐛 fix: Quote heredoc delimiter to fix bash syntax error

Changed <<EOF to <<'EOF' to prevent bash from trying to
expand GitHub Actions expressions as variables.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -59,7 +59,7 @@ jobs:
           ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
         run: |
           # Create prompt file for Claude Code
-          cat > /tmp/claude-prompt.txt <<EOF
+          cat > /tmp/claude-prompt.txt <<'EOF'
 You are fixing a bug or implementing a feature request for the KubeStellar Console project.
 
 Issue #${{ github.event.issue.number }}: ${{ github.event.issue.title }}
